name: known-redline-v1
description: Hand-crafted fixture: a synthetic AI review of a redlined contract with five flagged changes covering all three change types (auto_approved, needs_review, not_acceptable) and decisions covering all three actions (ACCEPT, COUNTER, REJECT). Used by tests/contract-review/counter-pdf.test.ts to verify counter-PDF rendering stays consistent.

aiChanges.original: One-way indemnity from Lessee to SirReel.
aiChanges.proposed: Mutual indemnity (Lessor also indemnifies Lessee for SirReel's negligence).
aiChanges.reasoning: Mutual indemnity shifts material risk back onto SirReel.
aiChanges.suggestedCounter: SirReel will agree only to its existing carve-out for sole negligence/willful act; mutual indemnity is not acceptable.

aiChanges.reasoning: Removing the cap exposes SirReel to unbounded production-loss claims.
aiChanges.suggestedCounter: Retain consequential-damages waiver as written; SirReel cannot accept removal of the cap.

aiChanges.original: Lessee responsible for fuel and operating expenses.
aiChanges.proposed: Adds 'subject to reasonable wear and tear' to operating costs.
aiChanges.reasoning: Standard industry softening; no material risk shift.

aiChanges.proposed: Reduce workers compensation minimum to statutory limits only.
aiChanges.reasoning: Statutory minimums vary by state; we typically require $1M.

decisions.note: Mutual indemnity is non-negotiable for SirReel.

decisions.counterLanguage: Lessee shall maintain workers compensation/employers liability insurance with minimum limits of $1,000,000, including coverage for any volunteers, interns, or independent contractors working on Lessee's behalf and under Lessee's supervision.
decisions.note: Hold the $1M minimum; offered as written counter.
